s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 BACK WINDOW GLASS STOPPER

s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of the No. 2 stoppers with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Install 2 new No. 2 stoppers onto the windshield glass, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Only 2-piece type No. 2 stoppers are supplied. Use the 2-piece type stoppers even if a 1-piece type was used.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 BACK WINDOW GLASS STOPPER

s2.ptxt: Install 2 new No. 1 stoppers to the vehicle body, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Only 2-piece type No. 1 stoppers are supplied. Use the 2-piece type stoppers even if a 1-piece type was used.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL BACK WINDOW MOULDING

s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of moulding with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Install a new moulding, as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Align the joint of the new moulding with the ceramic notch.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL BACK WINDOW GLASS ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Position the back window glass assembly.

s3.ptxt: Using a suction cup, place the back window glass in the correct position.
Check that the whole contact surface of the back window glass rim is perfectly even.
Align the matchmarks on the back window glass and vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the back window glass stoppers are attached to the vehicle body correctly.

s3.ptxt: Remove the back window glass assembly.

s2.ptxt: Using a brush, coat the installation surface on the vehicle body with Primer M.

item.ptxt: Do not coat the adhesive with Primer M.
Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer M for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of adhesive with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Apply adhesive (Adhesive: TOYOTA genuine windshield glass adhesive or equivalent).

s3.ptxt: Cut off the tip of the cartridge nozzle, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: After cutting off the tip, use all adhesive within the time described in the table below.

s3.ptxt: Load the sealer gun with cartridge.
Apply adhesive to the back window glass, as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: Install the back window glass assembly.

s3.ptxt: Using a suction cup, position the back window glass so that the matchmarks are aligned, and press it in gently along the rim.

item.ptxt: Check that the back window glass stoppers are attached to the vehicle body correctly.
Check the clearance between the vehicle body and back window glass.

s3.ptxt: Lightly press the front surface of the back window glass to ensure a close fit.

atten4.ptxt: Press the glass with force of 98 N (10 kgf, 22 lb) or more.

s3.ptxt: Hold the back window glass using protective tape until applied adhesive becomes hard.

atten3.ptxt: Do not drive the vehicle for the time described in the table below.

entry.ptxt: Minimum time prior to driving vehicle

s2.ptxt: Connect the connectors.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: CHECK FOR LEAKS AND REPAIR

s2.ptxt: After the adhesive has hardened, apply water from the outside of the vehicle. Check that no water leaks into the cabin.
If water leaks into the cabin, allow the water to dry and add adhesive.
Remove the protective tape.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Pull the roof headlining assembly into the vehicle through the rear left door.
Engage the 4 clips.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage the clamp to the rear pillar RH.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar RH.
Install the radio setting condenser to the front pillar RH with the bolt.
Connect the No. 1 roof wire connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Pull the roof headlining assembly into the vehicle through the rear left door.
Engage the hook, 4 clips, and 2 fasteners.
Connect the sliding roof drive gear connector.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage the clamp to the rear pillar RH.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar RH.
Install the radio setting condenser to the front pillar RH with the bolt.
Connect the No. 1 roof wire connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SUNSHADE TRIM HOLDER (w/ Rear Sunshade)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws.
Using a screwdriver, turn the pin of each sunshade trim holder 90° to install the sunshade trim holders.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SPOT LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Push the light bulb holder in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to engage the claw.
Engage the 4 claws.
Engage the 6 claws and install the spot light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR ASSIST GRIP SUB-ASSEMBLY

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the rear side and the front side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PACKAGE TRAY TRIM PANEL ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Pass the 3 rear seat belt floor anchors through the package tray trim panel assembly.
Engage the 4 clips and 5 claws and install the package tray trim panel assembly.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PACKAGE TRAY TRIM PANEL ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Pass the 3 rear seat belt floor anchors through the package tray trim panel assembly.
Engage the 4 clips and 5 claws and install the package tray trim panel assembly.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the rear seat shoulder belt hole cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the rear seat shoulder belt cover.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat outer belt assembly with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat outer belt assembly to overlap protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY (for RH Side)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat outer belt assembly with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat outer belt assembly to overlap protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH with the nut.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CHILD RESTRAINT SEAT ANCHOR BRACKET SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Install the child restraint seat anchor bracket sub-assembly with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 clips and 2 claws, then install the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat reclining control cable.
Engage the 2 clips and claw and then install the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Install the bolt.
Adjust the control lever to set the rear reclining adjuster assembly to its upper most position.
Pull plate A toward the front of the vehicle to lock the plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip RH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the center seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly LH with the 2bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the 2 rear seat belts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly RH with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the rear seat belt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)
INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat back in the cabin.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat back assembly with the 4 bolts.
Pass the 3 seat belts through and close the cap of the 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Install the floor anchor part with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY
CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
INSPECT SRS WARNING LIGHT
